headline: A Look At Pinnacle West Capital (PNW) Valuation After Profit Return And Reaffirmed 2026 Guidance
summary: Pinnacle West Capital (PNW) has drawn fresh attention after returning to profitability in the fourth quarter of 2025, reaffirming its 2026 earnings guidance and outlining growth and capacity plans tied to record Arizona demand. See our latest analysis for Pinnacle West Capital. The earnings return, reaffirmed 2026 guidance and fresh credit facility have come alongside a 30 day share price return of 9.02% and a 1 year total shareholder return of 15.60%. This suggests sentiment has strengthened...
